title: PharmEasy is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: PharmEasy is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
PharmEasy invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Full Stack Developer at our Amritsar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About PharmEasy:
PharmEasy is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PharmEasy!
